summary: Fixed blank window bug caused by incorrect preload script path. Changed from index.js to index.cjs in src/main/index.ts. Also installed bun v1.3.8 as package manager for faster builds. Application rebuilt, packaged, and launched successfully.
current_status: Application running - Preload path fix applied, bun installed
files_modified: src/main/index.ts (line 24: preload path fixed to index.cjs)
bugs_fixed: Preload script path was index.js instead of index.cjs - causing window.api to be undefined
All IPC calls were failing due to preload not loading
TrayManager was crashing due to nativeImage not being available
next_steps: Test API key save to confirm all fixes work
